goal: Add Codex as a third harness, refactor config to support multiple harnesses side-by-side, and remove all auto-detection so harness selection is always explicit.

tasks.name: Refactor types.ts for multi-harness config
tasks.description: Add 'codex' to Harness. Introduce ClaudeConfig, CodexConfig, and OpenCodeConfig interfaces. Refactor AtelierConfig to contain optional harness-scoped sections and remove all top-level harness-specific fields.

tests: AtelierConfig has claude?, codex?, opencode? sections
acceptance: No top-level harness, provider, default_model, build_model, plan_model, or flat agents on AtelierConfig

tasks.name: Update models.ts with OpenAI provider
tasks.description: Add 'openai' to Provider and to providers, providerModels, and defaultModels. Remove backward-compatibility exports (claudModels, opencodeModels). Import Provider from types.ts to avoid duplication.

tests: openai provider has default, recon, oracle, architect models
No claudModels or opencodeModels exports remain
acceptance: Provider type is imported from types.ts

tasks.name: Update errors.ts
tasks.description: Replace HarnessNotDetectedError with HarnessRequiredError that explains --yes requires --harness. Update ConfigNotFoundError and InvalidConfigError messages to mention re-init with --harness.

tests: HarnessRequiredError message lists claude, opencode, codex
acceptance: No references to auto-detection in error messages

tasks.name: Delete detect.ts
tasks.description: Delete the detection utility module and ensure no imports remain.

acceptance: grep shows no detectHarness or detect.ts imports

tasks.name: Refactor config.ts for harness-scoped schema
inputs: Design.md Config Schema and Multi-Harness Config Model
tasks.description: Introduce Zod schemas for ClaudeConfig, CodexConfig, and OpenCodeConfig. Refactor ConfigSchema to require at least one harness section. Detect old flat format by top-level 'harness' field and throw clear re-init error. Update getDefaultConfig to return a full AtelierConfig containing only the selected harness section plus shared fields.

tests: Old flat config throws clear re-init error
acceptance: bun test src/utils/config.test.ts passes after updates

tasks.name: Add getDeveloperInstructions() to templates.ts
tasks.description: Add a helper that returns the markdown template body without YAML frontmatter for Codex developer_instructions. Remove or update backward-compat helpers.

acceptance: No references to deleted backward-compat exports

tasks.name: Update claude.ts for harness-scoped config
tasks.description: Change generateClaude to accept ClaudeConfig plus shared fields instead of the full AtelierConfig. No behavior change for generated files.

acceptance: bun test src/generators/claude.test.ts passes after updates

tasks.name: Update opencode.ts for harness-scoped config
tasks.description: Change generateOpenCode to accept OpenCodeConfig plus shared fields instead of the full AtelierConfig. No behavior change for generated files.

acceptance: bun test src/generators/opencode.test.ts passes after updates
Generated opencode files match previous behavior

tasks.name: Create codex.ts generator
inputs: Design.md Codex Agent Format and Config TOML Generation
tasks.description: Implement generateCodex(config, basePath) that merges Atelier-managed keys into existing .codex/config.toml using smol-toml, and writes .codex/agents/{recon,oracle,architect}.toml with name, description, model, model_reasoning_effort, sandbox_mode, and developer_instructions.

tests: .codex/config.toml contains model, model_reasoning_effort, features.multi_agent, agents.max_threads, agents.max_depth
acceptance: Generated agent TOML files parse cleanly and contain required fields

tasks.name: Update atelier.ts CLI entry
tasks.description: Add --harness option to init, update, and remove commands. Update descriptions. Ensure --yes on init validates --harness before invoking init.

acceptance: atelier init --yes without --harness throws before file IO

tasks.name: Rewrite init.ts for explicit harness + additive multi-harness
tasks.description: Remove detection logic. Validate --harness or show interactive picker with no default. If --yes without --harness, throw HarnessRequiredError. Read existing config; if old flat format, throw re-init error. Add/replace only the selected harness section. Prompt for models per harness. Generate files for selected harness only. Keep --all skills install behavior.

tests: atelier init --harness codex --yes generates Codex files
atelier init --harness claude --yes then init --harness codex --yes produces multi-harness config
atelier init --yes without --harness exits with clear error
acceptance: bun test src/commands/init.test.ts passes after updates

tasks.name: Rewrite update.ts for single-harness update
tasks.description: Accept --harness option. Without it, prompt user to pick one configured harness from a single-select list. With --harness, update only that harness. Re-prompt for models and regenerate config and agent files for the selected harness, leaving other harnesses untouched.

tests: Without --harness, prompt lists only configured harnesses

tasks.name: Rewrite remove.ts for single-harness removal
tasks.description: Accept --harness option. Without it, prompt user to pick one configured harness from a single-select list. With --harness, remove only that harness. Delete generated files for the selected harness and remove its section from .atelier/config.json. Leave other harness sections and files untouched. Do not delete .atelier/ if other harnesses remain.

tests: remove --harness codex deletes only .codex/agents/*.toml and removes codex section

tasks.name: Update config.test.ts
tasks.description: Update all test configs to harness-scoped shape. Add tests for old flat config error, getDefaultConfig('codex'), and reading/writing multi-harness config.

tests: Old flat config throws re-init error

tasks.name: Update generator tests for harness-scoped configs
tasks.description: Update test fixtures to pass harness-scoped config objects. Keep assertion expectations for generated file content unchanged.

tasks.name: Update init.test.ts
tasks.description: Remove detect.js mock. Update tests to pass --harness. Add Codex init test, multi-harness additive init test, and update --yes without harness test for new error message.

tasks.name: Create codex.test.ts
tasks.description: Test generateCodex creates .codex/config.toml with merged keys, creates agent TOML files with correct fields, and preserves existing .codex/config.toml content.

tests: .codex/config.toml has expected keys and preserves custom keys
Agent TOML files have required fields

tasks.name: Add update/remove multi-harness tests
tasks.description: Add tests verifying update --harness codex and remove --harness codex only affect Codex files when Claude is also configured.

tests: update --harness codex leaves claude files untouched
remove --harness codex leaves claude files and config section untouched

tasks.name: Add smol-toml dependency
tasks.description: Install smol-toml and update bun.lock.

tasks.name: Final typecheck and test run
tasks.description: Run bun run typecheck and bun test. Fix any remaining errors.
